hooks.prompt:
Review the recent git commits in this session by running: git -C /home/dev/factory log --oneline -10

Then check git diff of the latest commit: git -C /home/dev/factory show --stat HEAD

Decide: was significant NEW user-facing functionality added (new feature, new API endpoint, new UI capability)? Bug fixes, refactors, config changes, and test changes do NOT count.

If YES: read /home/dev/factory/PLATFORMA.md and add a concise bullet point or short paragraph describing the new functionality in the appropriate section (or create a new section if needed). Write in Polish. Keep it consistent with the existing style.

If NO: do nothing.
